title: OREGON REFUGEE SCHOOL IMPACT PROGRAM - 211info
text: LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NORTHWEST PORTLAND OFFICE OREGON REFUGEE SCHOOL IMPACT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides educational support services to refugee newcomers and their schools. Supports students and their families in school registrations, school orientations, referrals to enrichment programs, interpretation during parent conferences, and a summer school readiness program. 7931 NE Halsey Street Suite 200 Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Refugees ages 6-18 years who have been in the United States for less than 12 months Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-2:30pm Email (971) 888-7831 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 888-7831 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Somali, Nepalese, Bhutanese, Burmese, Malay, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm, Friday 9am-2:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus stops and MAX station nearby Services: Parent/Family Involvement in Education * Refugees/Entrants/Asylees School Readiness Programs * Refugees/Entrants/Asylees Student Counseling Services * Refugees/Entrants/Asylees Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - REFUGEE RECEPTION AND PLACEMENT PROGRAM LEGAL SERVICES - SAFE ROUTE IMMIGRATION MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MULTICULTURAL COUNSELING SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NORTHWEST PORTLAND OFFICE
